list.name: event_type
list.label: Event type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT event_type FROM events ORDER BY event_type

list.name: shot
list.label: Shot
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT scope_shot FROM events WHERE scope_shot IS NOT NULL ORDER BY scope_shot

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', occurred_at) AS time, event_type AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM events WHERE status = 'error' AND $__timeFilter(occurred_at) AND event_type IN ($event_type) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('hour', occurred_at) AS time, COALESCE(error_code, 'UNKNOWN') AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM events WHERE status = 'error' AND $__timeFilter(occurred_at) AND event_type IN ($event_type) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: External tool failures (failed_tool)
panels.description: Counts of error events tagged with `failed_tool` in their payload, grouped by tool name. Captures husk/prman/mayapy/tex failures across all parent event types.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', occurred_at) AS time, payload->>'failed_tool' AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM events WHERE status = 'error' AND payload ? 'failed_tool' AND $__timeFilter(occurred_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Tractor saturation
panels.description: Waiting / running jobs and busy / total slots over time. Reads the periodic `tractor.farm.snapshot` event.

targets.rawSql: SELECT occurred_at AS time, (payload->>'waiting_jobs')::int AS waiting_jobs, (payload->>'running_jobs')::int AS running_jobs, (payload->>'busy_slots')::int AS busy_slots, (payload->>'total_slots')::int AS total_slots FROM events WHERE event_type = 'tractor.farm.snapshot' AND status = 'info' AND $__timeFilter(occurred_at) ORDER BY occurred_at

panels.title: Storage by category — total bytes (latest scan)
panels.description: Latest storage.scan.bucket events, summed per category.

targets.rawSql: WITH latest_scan AS (SELECT max(occurred_at) AS ts FROM events WHERE event_type = 'storage.scan.summary') SELECT payload->>'category' AS category, sum((payload->>'size_bytes')::bigint) AS bytes FROM events, latest_scan WHERE event_type = 'storage.scan.bucket' AND occurred_at >= latest_scan.ts - interval '1 hour' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

panels.title: Reclaimable storage by category (latest scan)
panels.description: Bytes flagged `is_reclaimable=true`, summed per category. The dashboard answer to 'how much space could we free if we ran cleanup right now?'

targets.rawSql: WITH latest_scan AS (SELECT max(occurred_at) AS ts FROM events WHERE event_type = 'storage.scan.summary') SELECT payload->>'category' AS category, sum((payload->>'size_bytes')::bigint) AS reclaimable_bytes FROM events, latest_scan WHERE event_type = 'storage.scan.bucket' AND (payload->>'is_reclaimable')::bool = true AND occurred_at >= latest_scan.ts - interval '1 hour' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

panels.title: Events per hour, by hostname (health-via-absence)
panels.description: If a workstation goes flat for several hours during work hours, something on that workstation is broken. Investigate the workstation's local logs.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', occurred_at) AS time, COALESCE(hostname, '<unknown>') AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(occurred_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Ingester lag
panels.description: Seconds between the most recent event the ingester has read and now(). Growing lag means the ingester has stalled or fallen behind.

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, spool_path AS metric, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - last_read_at))::int AS value FROM ingester_status
